messages.content: The Nut Job - Nickelodeon Promo

[Scene opens with upbeat music playing]

Narrator: Get ready for a wild adventure with the furry friends you love!

[Cut to a street crowded with animals running and playing]

Narrator: The Nut Job is coming to Nickelodeon!

[Cut to a close-up of Surly the squirrel]

Surly: Hey, I'm Surly, the quick-witted squirrel with a plan!

[Cut to Surly running and jumping through obstacles]

Narrator: Surly is the ultimate daredevil, always up for a challenge.

Surly: Let's do this!

[Cut to Andie the squirrel]

Andie: And I'm Andie, the brains of the operation.

[Cut to Andie solving a puzzle]

Narrator: She's smart, resourceful, and keeps the team focused.

Andie: We need to work together!

[Cut to Buddy the rat]

Buddy: Don't forget about me, Buddy the street-smart rat!

[Cut to Buddy sneaking past a group of humans]

Narrator: Buddy is the master of stealth, always finding a way to get what he wants.

Buddy: No mission is impossible!

[Cut to Precious the pug]

Precious: And I'm the adorable and fearless Precious!

[Cut to Precious standing tall]

Narrator: Precious may be small, but she's got a big heart and an even bigger bark.

Precious: I won't let anything stop us!

[Cut to a montage of action-packed scenes]

Narrator: Join this misfit team on an epic quest to save their home from destruction!

[Cut to a giant amusement park]

Narrator: They'll outsmart the bad guys, overcome their differences, and show the world that anything is possible when you work together.

[Cut to the words "The Nut Job" appearing on the screen]

Narrator: Get ready for The Nut Job, premiering on Nickelodeon!

[Scene ends with Surly, Andie, Buddy, and Precious striking cool poses]

Surly: Let's go, team!

[Music fades out]

Narrator: Don't miss the excitement, only on Nickelodeon!
Peek Freans The Nut Job TVC Promo

[Scene opens with cheerful music playing]

Narrator: Get ready for a delicious adventure with Peek Freans, The Nut Job!

[Cut to a vibrant kitchen scene with Peek Freans cookies]

Narrator: Peek Freans presents The Nut Job, a mouth-watering tale of nutty goodness!

[Cut to Surly the squirrel holding a Peek Freans cookie]

Surly: Hey, I'm Surly, the snacking squirrel with a passion for Peek Freans!

[Cut to Surly playfully eating a Peek Freans cookie]

Narrator: Surly just can't resist the crispy, nutty taste of Peek Freans cookies.

Surly: Mmm, so satisfying!

[Cut to Andie the squirrel holding a Peek Freans cookie]

Andie: And I'm Andie, always making the smart choice with Peek Freans.

[Cut to Andie enjoying a Peek Freans cookie with a thoughtful expression]

Narrator: Andie knows that Peek Freans cookies are made with wholesome ingredients and real nuts.

Andie: A delicious treat that I can feel good about!

[Cut to Buddy the rat holding a Peek Freans cookie]

Buddy: And don't forget about me, Buddy, the sneaky snacker!

[Cut to Buddy cleverly hiding and enjoying a Peek Freans cookie]

Narrator: Buddy knows that Peek Freans cookies are perfect for those moments when you need a quick, tasty snack.

Buddy: Sneakily satisfying!

[Cut to Precious the pug looking adorable with a Peek Freans cookie]

Precious: And I'm Precious, always ready to indulge in a Peek Freans delight!

[Cut to Precious happily munching on a Peek Freans cookie]

Narrator: Precious can't resist the irresistible combination of crunchy cookie and creamy nut-filled center.

Precious: Pure yum!

[Cut to a montage of joyful moments with the characters enjoying Peek Freans cookies]

Narrator: Join Surly, Andie, Buddy, and Precious on a snack-tastic journey with Peek Freans, The Nut Job!

[Cut to the words "Peek Freans The Nut Job" appearing on the screen]

Narrator: Indulge your taste buds with Peek Freans, available now!

[Scene ends with the characters happily eating Peek Freans cookies]

Narrator: Don't miss out on the nutty goodness, only with Peek Freans cookies!
Happy Meal The Nut Job TVC Promo

[Scene opens with joyful music playing]

Narrator: Get ready for a delightful adventure with McDonald's Happy Meal and The Nut Job!

[Cut to a vibrant McDonald's restaurant with kids eagerly waiting]

Narrator: McDonald's presents The Nut Job Happy Meal, a tasty treat for kids of all ages!

[Cut to Surly the squirrel surrounded by children holding Happy Meal boxes]

Surly: Hey kids, I'm Surly, and I've got a nutty surprise for you!

[Cut to Surly opening a Happy Meal box, revealing a Nut Job toy and tasty food]

Narrator: Surly is here to bring you a Happy Meal filled with excitement and deliciousness!

[Cut to animation of Happy Meal toys from The Nut Job]

Narrator: With The Nut Job Happy Meal, you can collect all your favorite characters from the movie!

[Cut to kids joyfully playing with the Nut Job toys]

Kids: Look at all the cool toys we got!

Narrator: Each Happy Meal includes a surprise Nut Job toy that will bring your imagination to life!

[Cut to a close-up of a Happy Meal box with delicious food]

Narrator: And let's not forget about the mouth-watering food!

[Cut to kids enjoying their Happy Meal]

Kids: Mmm, fries, burger, and a refreshing drink!

Narrator: McDonald's Happy Meal with The Nut Job gives you a complete and tasty meal that will satisfy your cravings!

[Cut to Surly having fun with the kids]

Surly: Join me and experience the joy of a Nut Job Happy Meal at McDonald's!

[Cut to the words "The Nut Job Happy Meal" appearing on the screen]

Narrator: Unleash the fun with The Nut Job Happy Meal, available now at McDonald's!

[Scene ends with kids happily enjoying their Happy Meals]

Narrator: Don't miss out on this extraordinary adventure, only at McDonald's!
Airheads Inside Out Promo

[Scene opens with energetic music playing]

Narrator: Get ready for an incredible adventure with Airheads and Inside Out!

[Cut to a colorful world filled with Airheads candies]

Narrator: Airheads presents Inside Out, a sweet and tangy journey that'll take your taste buds to new heights!

[Cut to Joy, one of the Inside Out characters, holding an Airheads candy]

Joy: Hi there, I'm Joy, and I've discovered the most delicious way to enjoy every emotion!

[Cut to Joy happily eating an Airheads candy]

Narrator: Joy knows that Airheads candies are bursting with flavor, just like the emotions inside your head.

Joy: Mmm, this is pure delight!

[Cut to Anger, another Inside Out character, holding an Airheads candy]

Anger: And I'm Anger, ready to fire up your taste buds!

[Cut to Anger savoring the tangy taste of an Airheads candy]

Narrator: Anger loves Airheads candies because they pack a tangy punch that'll make your mouth explode with excitement.

Anger: It's a flavor explosion!

[Cut to Sadness, another Inside Out character, holding an Airheads candy]

Sadness: And I'm Sadness, finding comfort in the sweet and chewy Airheads candy!

[Cut to Sadness enjoying a chewy Airheads candy]

Narrator: Sadness knows that Airheads candies provide a delightful chew that's sure to bring a smile to your face.

Sadness: It's like a little bit of happiness in candy form!

[Cut to a montage of all the Inside Out characters enjoying Airheads candies]

Narrator: Join Joy, Anger, Sadness, and the rest of the Inside Out gang on a flavor-loaded adventure with Airheads!

[Cut to the words "Airheads Inside Out" appearing on the screen]

Narrator: Experience the taste sensation with Airheads Inside Out, available now!

[Scene ends with the characters happily indulging in Airheads candies]

Narrator: Don't miss out on the deliciousness, only with Airheads!
Inside Out UK Released date
Inside Out was released in the United Kingdom on July 24, 2015.
Inside Out USA Released date
Inside Out was released in the United States on June 19, 2015.
Inside Out DVD USA Released date
Inside Out was released on DVD and Blu-ray in the United States on November 3, 2015.
Inside Out DVD UK Released date
Inside Out was released on DVD and Blu-ray in the United Kingdom on November 23, 2015.
Rio DVD AU Released date
Rio was released on DVD and Blu-ray in Australia on July 7, 2011.
Rio DVD KO Released date
Rio was released on DVD and Blu-ray in South Korea on August 10, 2011.
